items.name: Prometheus
items.agent: Alert Correlator, RCA Engine, Capacity Planner
items.note: Primary metrics platform — scrapes demo-api, demo-worker, Redis, PostgreSQL and node exporters every 15 seconds. ZeroOps Alert Correlator receives all Prometheus alerts via Alertmanager webhook. Metrics include request_rate, error_rate, p95_latency, queue_depth and container health.

items.name: Grafana
items.agent: Alert Correlator, Change Validator, Remediation Agent
items.note: Visualisation and alerting dashboard — all ZeroOps alert rules configured here. Every autonomous and HiTL remediation action posts a Grafana annotation with timestamp, action taken and outcome. Provides the visual audit trail for all ZeroOps operations.

items.name: Loki
items.note: Log aggregation platform — Promtail ships logs from demo-api, demo-worker, Odoo CRM and all containers. RCA Engine queries Loki for error logs correlated with alert onset. Enables root cause confirmation from log evidence without manual SSH access.

items.name: Blackbox Exporter
items.note: HTTP endpoint monitoring — probes demo-api (:8080/health) and Odoo CRM (:8069/web/health) every 15 seconds. CRMURLDown fires when probe_success=0 (0m pending). CRMSlowResponse fires when latency > 2s (5m pending). Primary trigger for all CRM and API scenarios.

items.name: Tempo
items.note: Distributed tracing — receives traces from demo-api via OpenTelemetry Collector. Enables RCA Engine to trace individual request failures and identify slow spans contributing to latency incidents.

items.name: Zammad
items.agent: Alert Correlator, Remediation Agent, Change Validator
items.note: ITSM system of record for the ZeroOps live stack. Every incident auto-creates a Zammad ticket with full diagnostic context. Status updated at each remediation step. Auto-closed on resolution with MTTR calculated. HiTL approval token referenced in ticket notes. Full audit trail visible in Zammad.

items.name: Slack
items.note: HiTL approval channel — Guardian scenario notifications sent via Slack webhook. Message includes incident ID, root cause, risk score, blast radius and one-click Approve/Reject URL. Approval token validated by RCA service before execution proceeds.

items.name: Enterprise Order API
items.agent: Alert Correlator, RCA Engine, Remediation Agent
items.note: Live Python Flask API — processes orders via Redis queue. Monitored by Prometheus (request_rate, error_rate, p95_latency) and Blackbox Exporter (/health endpoint). ServiceURLDown fires when container stops. HighErrorRate and HighLatency fire on degraded performance. Chaos endpoints available for demo scenarios.

items.name: Odoo CRM
items.agent: Alert Correlator, RCA Engine, Remediation Agent
items.note: Live Odoo 17 CRM instance — monitored via Blackbox Exporter HTTP probe on /web/health. CRMURLDown fires immediately (0m pending) when container stops. CRMSlowResponse fires after 5 minutes of latency > 2s. Primary demo scenario: docker stop odoo triggers autonomous restart in under 60 seconds.

items.name: Order Worker
items.agent: Alert Correlator, RCA Engine, Remediation Agent
items.note: Redis queue consumer — processes orders from demo-api via Redis list. HighQueueDepth alert fires when queue_depth > 50 — indicating worker has stopped consuming. Risk score 12 — fully autonomous. docker stop demo-worker triggers the queue depth scenario.

items.name: Redis
items.note: In-memory queue and cache — stores order queue between demo-api and demo-worker. Redis Exporter ships queue_depth metric to Prometheus every 15 seconds. Queue persistence means no orders lost when worker restarts — all queued items processed on worker recovery.

items.name: PostgreSQL
items.note: Primary database for demo-api — stores order records, error logs and transaction history. PostgreSQL Exporter ships database metrics to Prometheus. SlowDatabase alert fires when query time > threshold — triggers HiTL scenario.

items.name: OpenTelemetry Collector
items.note: Central telemetry pipeline — receives traces from demo-api via OTLP HTTP (:4318), exports to Tempo for distributed tracing. Also scrapes Prometheus metrics endpoint (:8889) and forwards to Prometheus. Single collection point for all observability signals.

items.name: Promtail
items.note: Log shipping agent — tails Docker container logs for all services and ships to Loki with service labels. Enables RCA Engine to query logs by container name, timestamp and log level without SSH access to containers.

items.name: Bridge API
items.agent: Alert Correlator, RCA Engine, Remediation Agent
items.note: ZeroOps Bridge API (:5002) — aggregates live metrics from Prometheus, Blackbox Exporter and Zammad into a single JSON endpoint. Powers the simulator Service Map and Application Health in real time. Endpoints: /metrics (health, queue, MTTR), /incidents (Zammad tickets), /events (Grafana annotations).
